selections.name: Cozy Curlin Kitten
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure (107) and class rating (105) in the field. Drops in class and should get a favorable pace setup.

selections.name: Barbratina
selections.reason: Classy mare with a 107 class rating. Gaffalione takes the mount, and she has the tactical speed to sit a perfect trip.

selections.name: Musical Prayer
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. rides this consistent closer. Will benefit from the long Churchill stretch if the early pace gets hot.

selections.name: Baytown Butterfly
selections.reason: Solid form cycle and competitive speed figures. Can hit the board at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: Bow Draw
danger_horse.reason: Asmussen trainee with back class. Capable of outrunning her odds if she finds her best stride.

selections.name: National Eclipse
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 108 and strong recent form. Luis Saez retains the mount and should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Saltwater Cowboy
selections.reason: Ships in with solid California form. The class drop makes him a major contender here.

selections.name: Hoodlum
selections.reason: Consistent runner for Norm Casse. Gaffalione aboard adds confidence; will be pressing the pace.

selections.name: Ready To Pounce
selections.reason: Veteran with back class. Capable of a late run to spice up the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Nip N Tuck
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail and has tactical speed. Could get brave if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Bee Crazy
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (114). Showed excellent speed in debut and should improve second time out.

selections.name: Gone And Plenty
selections.reason: First-time starter for Joe Sharp with Irad Ortiz Jr. riding. Workouts suggest she is ready to fire.

selections.name: Heart Of A Gunner
selections.reason: Well-bred Gun Runner filly. Kenneally barn is dangerous with debut runners.

selections.name: Let Her Fly
selections.reason: Solid debut effort. Should move forward with race experience under her belt.

danger_horse.name: Fuego Sunset
danger_horse.reason: Longshot with sneaky good works. Could close late for a piece.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #9, Exacta Box 1-9, Trifecta 1,9 / 1,6,7,9 / ALL

selections.name: Vanderbilt
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee with elite speed figures (109) and class (117). Irad Ortiz Jr. rides; looks like a standout.

selections.name: Evan On Earth
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Gaffalione rides; expect a sharp effort.

selections.name: Justifreak
selections.reason: Consistent runner with tactical speed. Outside draw is favorable for a stalking trip.

selections.name: Landing Craft
selections.reason: Has run fast enough to compete here. Rail draw means he must be sent early.

danger_horse.name: Nash Potatoes
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a late run if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Crossfire
selections.reason: Brendan Walsh trainee with strong class figures. Outside post is ideal for a 2YO sprint.

selections.name: Trim Castle
selections.reason: Showed speed in debut. Gaffalione stays aboard; should be prominent early.

selections.name: Bourbon Town
selections.reason: Luis Saez rides this first-timer. Workouts are sharp and pedigree suggests early speed.

selections.name: See You Soon
selections.reason: Joe Sharp first-timer with Irad Ortiz Jr. Must be respected on connections alone.

danger_horse.name: Karajan
danger_horse.reason: Dale Romans trainee; could surprise at a price.

selections.name: West Hollywood
selections.reason: Brad Cox runner with elite speed (116). Irad Ortiz Jr. rides; looks primed for a huge effort.

selections.name: Irish Aces
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (121). Gaffalione rides; major threat if he gets pace to close into.

selections.name: Lambeth
selections.reason: Consistent performer for Joe Sharp. Rail draw ensures a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Funtastic Again
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee with tactical speed. Florent Geroux will have him perfectly positioned.

danger_horse.name: Idratherbeblessed
danger_horse.reason: Mike Maker runner with back class. Can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Mitty's Griddy
selections.reason: Top speed and class figures in this scratched-down field. Outside draw is perfect for his stalking style.

selections.name: Forty Love
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides for Linda Rice. Consistent speed figures make him a logical contender.

selections.name: League Of Legends
selections.reason: Veteran with back class. Should get a good setup if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Livehappy
selections.reason: Outside draw and capable of picking up the pieces late.

danger_horse.name: Mamoot
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could force him to be sent; dangerous if left alone.

selections.name: Cash Call
selections.reason: Bob Baffert shipper with elite class (114). Florent Geroux rides; the one to beat.

selections.name: Anakarina
selections.reason: Dallas Stewart trainee with strong speed figures. Will be flying late.

selections.name: Silent Law
selections.reason: Another Baffert runner. High class rating and dangerous early speed.

selections.name: Roswell
selections.reason: Bill Mott trainee with Irad Ortiz Jr. Consistent and classy.

danger_horse.name: Tapit Quick
danger_horse.reason: Capable of outrunning her odds if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Competitive Market
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Gaffalione. Elite class rating and perfectly suited for this distance.

selections.name: Amberglen (ire)
selections.reason: Brad Cox runner with Irad Ortiz Jr. Strong European pedigree and solid US form.

selections.name: La Cantera (ire)
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (119). Luis Saez rides; major threat.

selections.name: Miss Pharaoh
selections.reason: Consistent closer who will benefit from a fast pace.

danger_horse.name: Pookie
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and tactical speed make her a dangerous pace presence.
